productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Navy Blue Sweatshirt
description: Composition Navy blue sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a hood with drawstrings, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two pockets on the front with asymmetric, ribbed openings, the number 2 appliquéd on the right sleeve, embroidered and appliquéd branding on the left chest and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Stay cosy in all seasons with this stylish sweatshirt from US Polo. The soft cotton fabric against your skin gives you exemplary comfort while the hood is extremely handy on a windy day. This is an easy top layer to put on or take off when the weather changes. Wear it over your Sports kit or over a t-shirt and jeans for a relaxed, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
